quality.clarity: The description is clear, including specific targeting limitations (undead/constructs) and scaling mechanics.
quality.flavor_integration: Mechanics align well with the concept of a rapid, mass restorative word.

mechanics.scaling_mechanism: Healing increases by 1d4 per spell slot level above 3rd.
mechanics.limitations: Does not affect undead or constructs.
mechanics.action_economy: Excellent; as a bonus action, it allows the caster to still use their main action (like casting a leveled spell or attacking).

recommendations.improvements: None required. The spell is mechanically sound and follows standard D&D 5e conventions for a 3rd-level bonus action mass heal.
